module_info.docstring:
Configuration management for Hermes Agent.

Config files are stored in ~/.hermes/ for easy access:
- ~/.hermes/config.yaml  - All settings (model, toolsets, terminal, etc.)
- ~/.hermes/.env         - API keys and secrets

This module provides:
- hermes config          - Show current configuration
- hermes config edit     - Open config in editor
- hermes config set      - Set a specific value
- hermes config wizard   - Re-run setup wizard

functions.name: get_hermes_home
functions.docstring: Get the Hermes home directory (~/.hermes).

functions.name: get_config_path
functions.docstring: Get the main config file path.

functions.name: get_env_path
functions.docstring: Get the .env file path (for API keys).

functions.name: get_project_root
functions.docstring: Get the project installation directory.

functions.name: ensure_hermes_home
functions.docstring: Ensure ~/.hermes directory structure exists.

functions.name: get_missing_env_vars
functions.docstring:
Check which environment variables are missing.

Returns list of dicts with var info for missing variables.

functions.name: _set_nested
functions.docstring:
Set a value at an arbitrarily nested dotted key path.

Creates intermediate dicts as needed, e.g. ``_set_nested(c, "a.b.c", 1)``
ensures ``c["a"]["b"]["c"] == 1``.

functions.name: get_missing_config_fields
functions.docstring:
Check which config fields are missing or outdated (recursive).

Walks the DEFAULT_CONFIG tree at arbitrary depth and reports any keys
present in defaults but absent from the user's loaded config.

functions.name: check_config_version
functions.docstring:
Check config version.

Returns (current_version, latest_version).

functions.name: migrate_config
functions.docstring:
Migrate config to latest version, prompting for new required fields.

Args:
    interactive: If True, prompt user for missing values
    quiet: If True, suppress output
    
Returns:
    Dict with migration results: {"env_added": [...], "config_added": [...], "warnings": [...]}

functions.name: _deep_merge
functions.docstring:
Recursively merge *override* into *base*, preserving nested defaults.

Keys in *override* take precedence. If both values are dicts the merge
recurses, so a user who overrides only ``tts.elevenlabs.voice_id`` will
keep the default ``tts.elevenlabs.model_id`` intact.

functions.name: load_config
functions.docstring: Load configuration from ~/.hermes/config.yaml.

functions.name: save_config
functions.docstring: Save configuration to ~/.hermes/config.yaml.

functions.name: load_env
functions.docstring: Load environment variables from ~/.hermes/.env.

functions.name: save_env_value
functions.docstring: Save or update a value in ~/.hermes/.env.

functions.name: get_env_value
functions.docstring: Get a value from ~/.hermes/.env or environment.

functions.name: redact_key
functions.docstring: Redact an API key for display.

functions.name: show_config
functions.docstring: Display current configuration.

functions.name: edit_config
functions.docstring: Open config file in user's editor.

functions.name: set_config_value
functions.docstring: Set a configuration value.

functions.name: config_command
functions.docstring: Handle config subcommands.
